headline: Don't snack your weekend momentum away—stay locked in.
summary: Today you execute: Huel-portioned meals only, 45 minutes on the rowing machine, zero emotional eating—you're 71 days behind and the 0.04 kg/week gap is closing your window.
details: Friday is historically where you derail with emotional snacking, and you cannot afford it. Use three pre-portioned Huel meals today with no additional food—no negotiation. Row for 45 minutes to create a 2500+ kilojoule deficit; your sedentary work demands intentional movement. You're behind by 71 days and your current pace (-0.53 kg/week) is short of target (-0.57 kg/week)—every Friday decision either compounds your deficit or begins catching up.
